name: happy-path-variant-a
task: I need a new domain that fetches analyst consensus ratings and price targets for a given stock ticker. Hook it up so the LLM can use it in chat.
assertions: Response creates at least 2 files inside a new domain directory under electron/domains/ (at minimum a router and a client)
The client file uses a retry mechanism or references the shared HTTP client from electron/core/
Response includes a tool definition entry with a 'name' field that follows the pattern get_<something> (e.g., get_analyst_ratings or get_price_targets)
The router file defines at least one tRPC procedure with a Zod input schema that validates a ticker parameter
Response includes instructions or a diff for wiring the router into electron/trpc/root.ts
